body.en:
Your app works great, but it probably looks plain. In this lesson, you'll tell Claude to add **modern CSS styling** — colors, fonts, spacing, and responsive design.

Good design isn't just about looks. It builds **trust**. A polished app says "this person cares about quality."
body.zh:
你的应用运行良好，但看起来可能很朴素。这节课你会让Claude添加**现代CSS样式**——颜色、字体、间距和响应式设计。

好的设计不仅是外观。它建立**信任**。精致的应用说明「这个人注重品质」。

body.en: Ask Claude to make your app look professional.
body.zh: 让Claude让你的应用看起来专业。

expectedCommands.command: claude "make the app look professional with modern CSS"
expectedCommands.output:
I'll give your app a modern, professional look!

✓ Added clean color scheme (soft background, accent colors)
✓ Styled input field and buttons
✓ Added hover effects and transitions
✓ Made layout responsive for mobile
✓ Added subtle shadows and rounded corners

Refresh to see the new design!

hints.en: Type: claude "make the app look professional with modern CSS"
hints.zh: 输入：claude "make the app look professional with modern CSS"

title.zh: 什么让设计看起来专业？

body.en:
A few simple CSS tricks make a huge difference:

- **Consistent spacing** — even gaps between elements
- **2-3 colors max** — don't use a rainbow
- **Rounded corners** — softer, more modern look
- **Subtle shadows** — depth without being heavy
- **Good fonts** — clean sans-serif fonts like Inter
- **Hover effects** — buttons that respond to mouse
body.zh:
几个简单的CSS技巧能产生巨大差异：

- **一致的间距** —— 元素间均匀的距离
- **最多2-3种颜色** —— 不要用彩虹
- **圆角** —— 更柔和、更现代
- **微妙的阴影** —— 深度但不沉重
- **好字体** —— 干净的无衬线字体如Inter
- **悬停效果** —— 按钮响应鼠标

title.zh: 响应式设计：移动端很重要

body.en:
**Responsive design** means your app looks good on any screen size. Claude automatically adds this when you ask for professional styling.

Try resizing your browser window — the app should rearrange itself to fit smaller screens. This is essential because most people browse on phones.
body.zh:
**响应式设计**意味着你的应用在任何屏幕尺寸上都好看。当你要求专业样式时，Claude会自动添加。

试试调整浏览器窗口大小——应用应该自动调整以适应小屏幕。这很重要，因为大多数人用手机浏览。

body.en: Here's how to change the main color. Just ask Claude to update the color!
body.zh: 这是改变主颜色的方法。让Claude更新颜色即可！

codeBlock.label: style.css

body.en:
When asking Claude for design changes, try these phrases:

- "Make it look like a modern SaaS app"
- "Use a dark theme with purple accents"
- "Add more white space between sections"
- "Make the buttons bigger and more touchable"
- "Center everything and make the max width 600px"

The more visual your description, the better the result.
body.zh:
让Claude修改设计时，试试这些说法：

- 「让它看起来像现代SaaS应用」
- 「用深色主题配紫色点缀」
- 「在部分之间增加更多空白」
- 「让按钮更大更容易点击」
- 「居中所有内容，最大宽度600px」

你的描述越形象，结果越好。

body.en: Your app is now functional AND beautiful. In the next lesson, we'll tackle something every developer faces: **debugging**. When things go wrong (and they will!), Claude helps you fix them.
body.zh: 你的应用现在既能用又好看。下一课我们处理每个开发者都会遇到的事：**调试**。当出问题时（一定会的！），Claude帮你修复。
